## Summary

Describe the change clearly and concisely.

## Related issue

Closes #(issue number)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking fix)
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only

## Vault / knowledge-base impact

- [ ] No change to `docs/`, vault layout, or `prompts/`
- [ ] Updates `docs/` or `prompts/`
- [ ] Changes vault conventions or compile behavior (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code style matches project tooling (black, isort, flake8)
- [ ] Self-reviewed
- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing behavior changed

## Additional context

Anything else useful for reviewers.
